title: Welcome back
subtitle: Sign in securely to your HR environment.
visualTitle: HR that moves with your organisation.
visualBody: One dependable place for people, organisation and payroll — with access always contained within the right customer environment.
visualPointIdentity: Your account is personal and verified.
visualPointContext: Tenant and administration boundaries are always enforced.
visualPointPreference: Your language and theme travel with you.
resetInstruction: Enter your email address. If an account exists, you will receive a secure recovery link.
resetSent: If this address exists, you will receive a recovery email.
resetSubtitle: Restore secure access to your account.
passwordMismatch: Enter two matching passwords of at least 12 characters.
recoverySessionMissing: This recovery link is invalid or has expired. Request a new link.
passwordUpdateFailed: The password could not be changed. Please try again.
passwordUpdated: Your password has been changed securely.
invalidCredentials: The email address or password is incorrect.
providerUnavailable: Google sign-in is not available yet.
invitationOnly: Liquid HR is accessible by invitation only.
inviteSubtitle: Link your verified account and then activate your access.
invitePasswordHelp: Leave this empty if you only use Google. A password must contain at least 12 characters.
inviteSuccess: Your access has been activated. You will be redirected.
inviteInvalid: This invitation is invalid or expired.
inviteExpired: This invitation has expired. Ask your administrator for a new invitation.
inviteEmailMismatch: You are signed in with a different email address from the invitation.
inviteAlreadyLinked: This employee is already linked to another account.
invitePasswordRejected: This password does not meet the security policy.
inviteConfiguration: Invitations have not been fully configured yet.
inviteUnknown: The invitation could not be activated. Please try again.
inviteSignInFirst: First sign in with the email address that received the invitation.
inviteGoogleHelp: Use Google when it is linked to the same verified email address.
inviteGoToLogin: Sign in with email and password
inviteDifferentAccount: Not the right account? Sign out and use the invited email address.
noAccessBody: Your account is signed in, but has not been linked to a customer environment yet.
noAccessHelp: Ask the HR administrator who invited you to check your access.
